title: Support Flask host_matching URLs for toolbar assets
description: Based on GitHub issue pallets-eco/flask-debugtoolbar#269. Flask-DebugToolbar does not generate valid asset URLs when the Flask app is created with host_matching=True and a static_host. Reproduce with an app configured for host_matching and verify the injected toolbar HTML no longer contains invalid http:/// asset URLs. Update the toolbar URL generation so JavaScript and CSS assets load correctly for host-matched routes.

title: Remove remaining jQuery migrate deprecation warnings
description: Based on GitHub issue pallets-eco/flask-debugtoolbar#281. Version 0.15.1 still emits jQuery Migrate warnings from toolbar JavaScript, including deprecated $.trim usage and deprecated bind/unbind handlers. Clean up the toolbar JavaScript and bundled tablesorter usage so the debug toolbar no longer triggers those migration warnings while preserving the existing toolbar behavior.

title: Fix profiler panel dump_filename attribute error
description: Based on GitHub issue pallets-eco/flask-debugtoolbar#286. Enabling the profiler panel can raise AttributeError because ProfilerDebugPanel does not have a dump_filename attribute when the panel runs. Make the profiler panel handle its dump filename consistently so enabling profiling no longer crashes a request.
